source_pr.title: *: add foreign key constraint check when execute delete statement
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: crazycs520 <crazycs520@gmail.com>

<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #38221

Problem Summary: add foreign key constraint check when execute delete statement

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: Foreign key correctness change (add FK constraint check on DELETE) plus tests; no concrete flaky failure signature is captured in this case.
failure_signature: No explicit flaky failure signature in patch (correctness fix + tests).
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: The patch adds foreign key constraint checks when executing DELETE (correctness/feature behavior), and updates related planner/executor code and tests. It does not provide a concrete intermittent flaky failure signature or a targeted stabilization fix, so keep this case as needs-more-evidence.
fix_pattern: Add foreign key constraint check for DELETE statements.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select id, a, b from t1 order by id").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1 1")) (executor/foreign_key_test.go)

files: executor/builder.go, executor/delete.go, executor/fktest/foreign_key_test.go, executor/foreign_key.go, executor/foreign_key_test.go, planner/core/common_plans.go, planner/core/foreign_key.go, planner/core/logical_plan_builder.go, planner/core/point_get_plan.go
